mapper.select: SELECT so.*, o.id as oid, o.real_name as oreal_name, o.phone as ophone, m.id as mid, m.real_name as mreal_name, v.id as vid, v.plate_number, v.model FROM service_order so LEFT JOIN user o ON so.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN user m ON so.mechanic_id = m.id LEFT JOIN vehicle v ON so.vehicle_id = v.id WHERE so.id = #{id}
SELECT so.*, v.plate_number, v.model FROM service_order so LEFT JOIN vehicle v ON so.vehicle_id = v.id WHERE so.owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY so.create_time DESC

SELECT so.*, v.plate_number, v.model, o.real_name as oreal_name, o.phone as ophone FROM service_order so LEFT JOIN vehicle v ON so.vehicle_id = v.id LEFT JOIN user o ON so.owner_id = o.id WHERE so.mechanic_id = #{mechanicId} ORDER BY so.create_time DESC

SELECT so.*, o.real_name as oreal_name, o.phone as ophone, m.real_name as mreal_name, v.plate_number, v.model FROM service_order so LEFT JOIN user o ON so.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN user m ON so.mechanic_id = m.id LEFT JOIN vehicle v ON so.vehicle_id = v.id ORDER BY so.create_time DESC

SELECT so.*, o.real_name as oreal_name, v.plate_number FROM service_order so LEFT JOIN user o ON so.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN vehicle v ON so.vehicle_id = v.id WHERE so.status = #{status} ORDER BY so.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM service_order WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_order(order_no, owner_id, vehicle_id, mechanic_id, appointment_time, service_type, service_content, amount, status, create_time) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{ownerId}, #{vehicleId}, #{mechanicId}, #{appointmentTime}, #{serviceType}, #{serviceContent}, #{amount}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE service_order SET mechanic_id = #{mechanicId}, appointment_time = #{appointmentTime}, service_content = #{serviceContent}, amount = #{amount}, status = #{status}, complete_time = #{completeTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT so.*, o.real_name as oreal_name, o.phone as ophone, m.real_name as mreal_name, v.plate_number, v.model FROM service_order so LEFT JOIN user o ON so.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN user m ON so.mechanic_id = m.id LEFT JOIN vehicle v ON so.vehicle_id = v.id ORDER BY so.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT * FROM part WHERE id IN
#{id}
